decisions.title: Approve OncoEMR Integration protocol for Rocky Mountain Cancer Centers
decisions.notes: Security audit cleared and API gateway approved for pilot EMR data connection.

decisions.title: Standardize CRC Workflow Training to a 2-day virtual curriculum
decisions.notes: Proposed shift to 100% remote self-paced training with interactive Q&A clinics.

decisions.title: Approve Biomarker Gateway Setup schema for Highlands Oncology Group
decisions.notes: Validated HL7 FHIR profile matches core clinical trials platform requirements.

risks.title: Delays in EMR connection validation by community clinical sites
risks.mitigation: Provide automated self-service validation scripts to ease external IT burdens.

risks.title: Low clinical coordinator engagement during training modules
risks.mitigation: Conduct weekly drop-in clinic hours and issue digital enablement badges on completion.

risks.title: Data latency in the point-of-care matching gateway alerts
risks.mitigation: Optimize database query rules and implement local 24-hour cache refreshing.
